import io
import string
import list

fn sorted_insert(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ val: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut res: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  mut inserted = false
  while i < sorted.len()
    let elem = match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and val <= elem
      res = list.push(res, val)
      inserted = true
    end
    res = list.push(res, elem)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    res = list.push(res, val)
  end
  res
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let token = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(n)
    if not list.contains(sorted, n)
      sorted = sorted_insert(sorted, n)
    end
  when None
    # skip non-integer tokens
  end
  i = i + 1
end
mut output = ""
mut j = 0
while j < sorted.len()
  let val = match sorted.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    output = "#{val}"
  else
    output = "#{output} #{val}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end
print(output)
